name: Minimize Dependencies
description: Prefer stdlib over 3rd party packages. Every dependency must be justified.
content:
## Dependency Philosophy: Minimize 3rd Party Dependencies

- **Default to stdlib.** Reach for an external package only when stdlib is genuinely insufficient.
- Every new dependency requires a one-line justification in the PR description.
- Prefer single-purpose, well-maintained, low-dependency packages over large frameworks.
- Audit `go.sum` / `package-lock.json` / `requirements.txt` regularly — remove unused deps.
- No dependencies with no LICENSE file, no recent activity (>2 years), or known CVEs.
